generatedBy: Ascendant Realms extended automated playtest scenario lab v0.13.1

routeVerdictDistribution.value: risky conversion route; monitor clarity and pacing
decisive but not free; monitor Cinderfen speed

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Strong earned-power route with some failures or costs outside ideal watchpoint nodes.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: >=90% full-profile win rate plus >=95% low-loss wins on Ashen/Cinderfen watchpoint nodes.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: >=95% full-profile win rate, zero failures, and <=1 average unit loss.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 81% win rate; 100% Ashen/Cinderfen low-loss win rate; 1.8 average losses.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: Prioritize human testing; do not tune from automation alone.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not nerf retinue or Training Yard II from clean automated watchpoint nodes alone.
evidence: Retinue + Training Yard II: 85-15-5 across 105 extended metric rows.
Ashen/Cinderfen low-loss wins: 45/45.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Greedy is risky but survives openings; failures read as conversion or pacing rather than raw weakness.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: >=65% timeout rate with <25% win rate across repeated extended rows.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: >=75% timeout/loss rate plus resource surplus remaining high across multiple nodes.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 36% win rate; 51% timeout rate; 9793.8 average resource surplus.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: Monitor conversion clarity and pacing; keep human testing first.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not buff economy just because greed is risky or timeout-prone.
evidence: Greedy Economy: 155-55-215 across 425 extended metric rows.
First-wave survived rate: 100%; conversion/clear-speed timeouts: 55.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Fast Army is faster and often good in Cinderfen but still has failures elsewhere.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: >=96% Cinderfen win rate, <=10% whole-profile failure rate, and <=1.5 average losses.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: Cinderfen sweep plus whole-suite sweep across repeated runs.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 88% Cinderfen win rate; 38% whole-profile failure rate.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: Monitor Cinderfen speed and ask humans whether it feels decisive or trivial.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not slow Fast Army just because it is the fastest route.
evidence: Fast Army: 265-120-40 across 425 extended metric rows.
Cinderfen Fast Army wins: 110/125.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Early-node defeats remain near zero in automation.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: >=15% early-node defeat rate or repeated early-pressure defeats.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 0% early defeat rate; 0% early-pressure defeat rate.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not weaken early tests or mask first-wave failures.
evidence: Early-node record: 470-0-0 across 470 extended metric rows.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Safe routes win pressure nodes and warnings appear before pressure matters.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: <90% safe-route pressure win rate, warnings missing from most pressure rows, or very short reaction windows.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: Repeated safe-route pressure defeats with missing/late warnings.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 100% Safe Beginner pressure-node win rate; 84% warning-row rate; average reaction window 139.8s.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: Human testing required for noticeability and stress.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not treat warning counts as proof that humans saw or understood warnings.
evidence: Pressure/Cinderfen rows: 570.
Pressure warnings shown: 1095.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Safe Beginner wins all current rows; other route timeouts can remain monitor items.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: Any repeated Safe Beginner failure or >=45% route timeout rate.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 100% Safe Beginner win rate; 22% all-profile timeout rate.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: No structural tuning; prioritize human route feel.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not tune Cinderfen from non-safe route timeouts alone.
evidence: Cinderfen Crossing record: 230-0-65 across 295 extended metric rows.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Safe Beginner wins all current rows; other route timeouts can remain monitor items.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: Any repeated Safe Beginner failure or >=45% route timeout rate.
watchpointRegressions.currentSignal: 100% Safe Beginner win rate; 20% all-profile timeout rate.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: No structural tuning; prioritize human route feel.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not tune Cinderfen from non-safe route timeouts alone.
evidence: Cinderfen Watch record: 220-0-55 across 275 extended metric rows.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Safe play remains stable, with route timeouts watched as pacing/final-assault evidence.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: Any repeated safe-route failures or >=10% defeat rate.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: Safe-route failures plus high timeout rate across repeated batches.
watchpointRegressions.recommendedAction: Monitor final-assault pacing and ask humans whether timeouts feel fair.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not change Ashen Outpost numbers from timeout telemetry alone.
evidence: Ashen Outpost record: 190-0-75 across 265 extended metric rows.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Primary objective completion stays at or above 70% across overlapped extended profile rows.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not infer player confusion from objective completion alone.
evidence: Primary objective completed in 1320/1775 extended metric rows.

watchpointRegressions.normalExpectedState: Resource problems are localized, not a global economy starvation signal.
watchpointRegressions.warningThreshold: >=20% non-victory rows end with very low resource surplus.
watchpointRegressions.strongSignalThreshold: >=35% non-victory starvation rows, suggesting future economy-system review.
watchpointRegressions.doNotDo: Do not globally raise resources without node/profile evidence.
evidence: Low-resource non-victory rows: 0/1775.

noTuneReasons: The extended batch repeats deterministic simulator evidence; it is stronger regression evidence, not human feedback.
No watchpoint combines repeated automated signals with real human confirmation.
Pressure-warning noticeability, route feel, and fun remain unavailable to automation.
Most current signals are monitor or human-testing outcomes rather than numeric-tuning outcomes.
humanTestingRecommendations: Retinue + Training Yard II through Ashen Outpost, Cinderfen Crossing, and Cinderfen Watch.
Greedy Economy with explicit notes on resource-to-army conversion timing.
Fast Army through Cinderfen to judge decisive play versus trivialization.
Pressure warning noticeability under real combat stress.
Ashen Outpost pacing and final-assault readability.

determinismNotes: Each iteration reruns the deterministic scripted simulator from the same content baseline.
Seed identifiers are stable evidence labels for repeated batches; they do not introduce random gameplay variation.
Repeated identical signals improve regression confidence in the tooling layer, but they are not human playtest feedback.
